name: Turn Undead
author: Poki
description: Hunt Count Dracula in Turn Undead! In this action platformer made by Nitrome, you play as a vampire hunter who sets out to catch the legendary vampire; Dracula. To do so, you'll have to make your way through monster-filled levels. Luckily, you have your trusty crossbows to make short work of them. Enemies only move when you do, so plan your moves well! See if you can collect all the crosses and make it to the end of Turn Undead! How to play Turn Undead? Use A and D or the left and right arrow keys to move around! Use W or the up arrow key to move jump! Use spacebar to shoot a stake! Who created Turn Undead? Turn Undead was created by Nitrome. Play their other games on Poki!: Double Edged , bad-ice-creamr and Twin Shot How can I play Turn Undead for free? You can play Turn Undead for free on Poki.
